meta.title: Everyday Astronaut - "Astronaut Beach House"
meta.description:
7 song EP - "Maximum Aerodynamic Pressure" available now everywhere!

iTunes - https://itunes.apple.com/us/album/maximum-aerodynamic-pressure/1443689755

Spotify - https://open.spotify.com/album/56J65dFdTwyjN39L3r3RkQ?si=xG9lUDh1R4iRmHqWcq9iOw

Or anywhere else you listen to music!

Footage by NASA
